topic: Automated invoicing per service for PRO firms — billing 30 clients in the time it used to take to bill three
format: Compare 'how most Oman businesses do X today' with 'how SmartPRO Hub customers do X'
post:
Most PRO firms in Oman bill the same way at month-end: open a spreadsheet, scroll through notes, try to remember which service was done for which client, then send a PDF over WhatsApp.

SmartPRO Hub customers skip all of that.

Every completed service — work permit, visa renewal, Sanad filing, government document — gets logged the moment it's done. When billing time comes, invoices generate automatically, broken down by service and client.

30 clients billed in the time it used to take to handle three.

No chasing notes. No manual entries. No missed line items.

We built this because PRO firms lose real money every month — not from bad clients, but from incomplete invoices. A service gets done, nobody records it, nobody charges for it.

That gap adds up fast across 30, 50, 80 clients.

Automated invoicing per service is live on SmartPRO Hub starting at OMR 25/month. No credit card needed for the 14-day trial.

If your billing still depends on someone's memory, what's that actually costing you?

Book a 30-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=feature-spotlight
